exploration_notes: Part 1 - envoyproxy/data-plane-api xDS service definitions: Found 42 .proto files containing `service` declarations with `rpc` methods across v2, v3, v2alpha, and v3alpha API versions. The v3 xDS core services include: AggregatedDiscoveryService (ADS), ClusterDiscoveryService (CDS), EndpointDiscoveryService (EDS), ListenerDiscoveryService (LDS), RouteDiscoveryService (RDS), ScopedRoutesDiscoveryService (SRDS), SecretDiscoveryService (SDS), RuntimeDiscoveryService (RTDS), HealthDiscoveryService (
